author: y4rr
content: Observation: BEFORE probes (pre-V.2) — all 5 B.5.b Swin-T shape/finite/param/custom-classes/determinism tests passed (swin_tiny_output_shape_matches_reference, swin_tiny_output_finite, swin_tiny_param_count_in_range, swin_tiny_custom_num_classes, swin_tiny_deterministic_forward). AFTER probes (post-V.2) — 5 new fixture-backed swin_tiny_v2_* tests added, all passing. No source changes to swin.rs required.
